import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let a = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(0) when Some(x) x when None return Err("missing A") end)
  when Some(n) n
  when None return Err("invalid A")
  end
  let b = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(1) when Some(x) x when None return Err("missing B") end)
  when Some(n) n
  when None return Err("invalid B")
  end
  let s = match string.parse_int(match parts.get(2) when Some(x) x when None return Err("missing S") end)
  when Some(n) n
  when None return Err("invalid S")
  end
  mut result = ""
  mut cur = a
  mut first = true
  while cur < b
    if first
      result = "#{cur}"
      first = false
    else
      result = "#{result} #{cur}"
    end
    cur = cur + s
  end
  println(result)
  Ok(())
end
